column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One sample per line.
# Use this for batch runs; single-sample runs can use config.yaml directly.
#   sample         - output directory name for this Xenium Ranger run
#   xenium_bundle  - path to Xenium output bundle directory
#   command        - Xenium Ranger command: resegment or import-segmentation
#   segmentation_file - required when command=import-segmentation; path to cells.csv.gz
# Optional: Titan integration (append to each row; leave blank if unused)
